title: PayPal vs Square
description: Compare PayPal vs Square in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right finance & accounting tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Square emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.1/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, PayPal or Square?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Square edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. PayPal excels at PayPal is a finance & accounting platform that helps Consumers and Merchants and, while Square is stronger for Square is a finance & accounting platform that helps Small Businesses and Retail.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between PayPal and Square?
faqs.answer: PayPal and Square differ in pricing (Transaction-based (2.99%+$0.49) vs Free – $79/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is PayPal cheaper than Square?
faqs.answer: PayPal starts at Transaction-based (2.99%+$0.49) while Square starts at Free – $79/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, PayPal or Square?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for finance & accounting. Square scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use PayPal and Square together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, PayPal or Square?
faqs.answer: Both PayPal and Square prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which finance & accounting tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor PayPal for large teams, while Square may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Transaction-based (2.99%+$0.49) pricing.
